---
title: "Mary Avice Butler"
---

## Mary Avice Butler

**Dates:** (1855-1938)

### Description

member of the Gosling Society, youngest daughter of the Very Rev. William John Butler

### Biography

She was a Gosling as ‘Mavis’ and an associate of the Wantage sisterhood.  [<i>Butler of Wantage</i>, 1848; will, <i>Memoirs of Arthur John Butler</i>]

### Letters

- Letter from December 12, 1896
- Letter from May 24th 1875
- Letter from Aug 7th [?1874[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from [1861]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
